name: FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL)
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Authoritative flood zone polygons (SFHA, BFE, FIRM panels). Also exposed via the legacy NFHLWMS portal at https://hazards.fema.gov/femaportal/wps/portal/NFHLWMS.

name: OpenFEMA Disaster Declarations Summaries (v2)
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: OData-style filters, $top max 10000 per page. v1 was retired; v2 is current.

name: OpenFEMA Hazard Mitigation Assistance Projects
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: BRIC/HMGP project-level records; exact dataset name should be reconfirmed against the current OpenFEMA data sets catalog before production use.

name: NOAA/NWS Alerts API
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Requires a unique, descriptive User-Agent header (e.g. 'firip.app, ops@firip.app'). Defaults to GeoJSON. Used for /alerts/active, /alerts/active/area/FL, forecasts, observations.

name: National Hurricane Center GIS Products
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Forecast track, cone of uncertainty, and wind field products during active storms; best track / historical archives otherwise.

name: NOAA CO-OPS Tides & Currents API
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Station metadata via https://api.tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov/mdapi/prod/. Used for coastal water level / storm surge context in Florida coastal counties.

name: USGS Water Data OGC API
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Replaces legacy waterservices.usgs.gov (decommissioning early 2027). Use 'monitoring-locations', 'daily' and 'time-series-metadata' collections.

name: SFWMD DBHYDRO Insights
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: DBHYDRO Insights replaced the retired DBHYDRO Browser in 2025. Hydrologic/water-quality time series for South Florida.

name: South Florida WMD GIS Open Data Hub
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: Covers Broward, Collier, Glades, Hendry, Lee, Martin, Miami-Dade, Monroe, Palm Beach, St. Lucie, and portions of Charlotte, Highlands, Okeechobee, Orange, Osceola, Polk.

name: St. Johns River WMD Geospatial Open Data
agency: St. Johns River Water Management District
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: Covers Brevard, Clay, Duval, Flagler, Indian River, Nassau, Seminole, St. Johns, Volusia, and portions of Alachua, Baker, Bradford, Lake, Marion, Okeechobee, Orange, Osceola, Putnam.

name: Southwest Florida WMD Open Data
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: Covers Citrus, DeSoto, Hardee, Hernando, Hillsborough, Manatee, Pasco, Pinellas, Sarasota, Sumter, and portions of Charlotte, Highlands, Lake, Levy, Marion, Polk.

name: Northwest Florida WMD Open Data
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: Covers Bay, Calhoun, Escambia, Franklin, Gadsden, Gulf, Holmes, Jackson, Leon, Liberty, Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Wakulla, Walton, Washington, and western Jefferson.

name: Suwannee River WMD GIS Data
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm district terms of use
notes: No public ArcGIS Hub found at verification time; data distributed as zipped shapefiles via the District document center. Treat ingestion as manual/batch, not API-driven, until reverified. Covers Columbia, Dixie, Gilchrist, Hamilton, Lafayette, Madison, Suwannee, Taylor, Union, and portions of Alachua, Baker, Bradford, Jefferson, Levy, Putnam.

name: Florida Geospatial Open Data Portal
agency: Florida GIO / Department of Management Services
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm state terms of use
notes: Aggregates statewide datasets across agencies; useful fallback when a county-specific portal is unavailable.

name: Florida DEP Geospatial Open Data
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm state terms of use
notes: 300+ datasets: land use/land cover, environmental resource permits, UIC wells, WMD land use layers.

name: FDOT Open Data Hub
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm state terms of use
notes: Roadways, traffic (AADT), safety/crash, and project-tracking layers; used for evacuation-route and infrastructure-exposure context.

name: MyFloridaMarketPlace (state procurement)
license: Public sector solicitation data; confirm reuse terms
notes: State-level solicitations/bids. No confirmed bulk/API export at verification time - scaffold as scraped/manual ingestion pending the procurement module.

name: FloridaCommerce (economic / project data)
license: Public Domain (assumed); confirm state terms of use
notes: Successor agency to the Florida Department of Economic Opportunity (DEO). Confirm current domain/branding before production use.

name: SAM.gov Opportunities API v2
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Requires a free SAM.gov API key. Supports active procurement search with pagination and posted-date windows (max 1-year window per request).

name: Grants.gov Search API
agency: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services / Grants.gov
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Endpoint path historically changes between Grants.gov platform revisions; reconfirm before relying on it in production.

name: U.S. Census Bureau API
license: Public Domain (U.S. Government Work)
notes: Free API key recommended for sustained use. Used for population/housing-unit context behind county and property risk scoring.
